title: drosera intermedia subvar. corymbosa
intro: Drosera intermedia subvar. corymbosa, also known as the spoonleaf sundew, is a carnivorous plant species that belongs to the Drosera genus. This plant contains medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which contain iridoid glycosides, including droserone, that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Drosera intermedia subvar. corymbosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antispasmodic, making it useful for treating coughs, sore throats, and bronchial congestion. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
